resources.string: Investigation Screen
Welcome to the Investigation screen! This is your main dashboard for tracking evidence and identifying the ghost.
The Journal
The Journal is where you record evidence found during the investigation.

Select evidence to filter the list of possible ghosts. You can also tap on ghost names to see more details. Tap on Evidence to see more details for those as well. This list will show Evidence as disabled if the Difficulty settings dictate that.
Status Bar
Keep an eye on the status bar for your current sanity, the remaining preparation time, the current weather, etc.
Tools and Configs
The toolbar gives you access to various tools like the Operation Configurations, BPM counter, Timers, and Difficulty analysis.
Operation Config
Configure the map, difficulty, and weather to match your ongoing investigation.
Map Selection
Select the location of the current investigation. This affects the Sanity drain rate modifier.
Difficulty Settings
Select the difficulty of the current investigation. This will affect the Sanity drain rate modifier.
Weather Control
Select the Weather of the current investigation. When set, this will show the Temperature tracker. Note: Only the Blood Moon will affect the Sanity drain rate modifier.
Temperature Meter

This will show a rough approximation of the temperature of indoor rooms, but only when both the Weather is configured and the Operation Timer is running. It will either raise or lower depending on the state of the Fuse Box. Note: For more accurate approximations, keep the Fuse Box toggle up\-to\-date.
Operation Timer
This feature simulates an ongoing investigation. The Timer represents the remaining preparation time. This must be running to track both Sanity and Temperature.
Fuse Box Button
This represents the state of the main fuse box. If the difficulty has a Broken fuse box, this will be disabled. The state of this will affect the Temperature meter.
Teammate Death
Press this for when a Teammate meets their demise. It will remove the appropriate amount of Sanity from the Sanity tracker.
Sanity Medication
Press this for when you consume a Sanity Medication. It will increase the appropriate amount of Sanity for the Sanity tracker.
Sanity Meter
Status Bar
Sanity Management
Your approximate Sanity levels are represented here, and can be manually adjusted. Sanity drain rate is affected by the combination of Difficulty and Map size, as well as the ghost\'s behaviors.
Secondary Evidence

Identify secondary evidence traits to narrow down the ghost type. Some traits are unique to specific ghosts, while others simply provide a higher or lower likelihood. The Journal will reorder to accommodate any selections.
Unique Traits Only
Filter the list to only show traits that are unique to a single ghost. This is often the fastest way to confirm a specific ghost.
Category Filter
Narrow down the list by selecting a specific category, such as "Behavior" or "Abilities", to find relevant traits faster.
Operation Details
Review the specific details of your current operation, including ghost behavior and investigation settings.
Investigation Timers

Use these timers to track protection time from a room cleansing, hunt durations, hunt cooldowns, and fingerprint lifetimes. If you see ghost names displayed with each timer, it means the ghost might modify the timer in some way.
Cursed Operation
Enable this if a Cursed Possession has been used and a hunt is triggered by it, as the Operation is considered Cursed. Cursed hunts last longer than a standard hunt.
Hunt Duration

Monitor the length of an active hunt. This helps you know when it\'s safe to come out of hiding. Some ghosts have different durations. This is affected by the Difficulty level, Map size, and if the operation is Cursed.
Hunt Cooldown
Track the minimum time between hunts. Use this window to move between hiding spots or gather evidence.
Linked Timers
When linked, the hunt cooldown timer starts automatically as soon as the hunt duration timer finishes, providing a seamless timeline. This does not work well with an Obambo in its Aggressive state.
Room Cleanse Timer
Track the duration of protection after cleansing a room with a Smudge Stick. Different ghosts have different prevention durations.
Fingerprint Timer

Track how long fingerprints will remain visible. This helps you know if you need to re-check a door or window. An Obake has the potential to make a fingerprint appear for a shorter period. Time is affected by the Fingerprint Duration difficulty settings.
Footstep Analyzer
Measure the ghost\'s movement speed (BPM) to help identify it. Different ghosts have distinct walking speeds.
Active Modifiers
See how the current investigation settings, such as Weather or ghost speed modifiers, are affecting the ghost\'s movement. Be sure to configure the Operation to get the most accurate readings!
Apply Measurement
Choose which measurement (Instant, Average, or Weighted) to apply to your investigation to help narrow down the ghost type.
Instant takes the latest BPM.
Average takes the average of all BPMs within the Sample interval.
Weighted takes the average of all averaged BPMs within the Sample interval. This is best used with a smaller Sample interval.
BPM Visualizer
Tap along with the ghost\'s footsteps to see its movement speed graphed in real-time. Use the dropdowns to adjust the view.
Configure Window
Configure the Viewport time to set the visible time range. Configure the Sampling interval to set the time range for sampling Averaged and Weighted measurements.
